hero.analysisPill: See the AI Visibility Index for your industry
hero.title: AI visibility, engineered from your real customers.
hero.subtitle: Refinea starts from your real customers to find out what they ask AI, why AI recommends someone else, and gives you the tools to change the answer.
hero.footnote: 14 days free on the Pro plan · Setup in 10 minutes

section1.title: Your real customers. Not marketing assumptions.
section1.body: If you don't know who your real customers are, you end up optimizing for prompts nobody actually asks. Refinea analyzes who is already searching for what you sell by intent, language, and geography and builds buyer personas from actual demand. For each persona, we generate the prompts they would ask ChatGPT, Gemini and Perplexity, validated against our database of over one million real searches.
section1.caption: Buyer personas built from actual customer demand, not from guesswork.

section2.title: See who AI recommends and who it ignores.
section2.body: You can rank first on Google and still be invisible on ChatGPT or Perplexity, traditional SEO metrics don't cover what's happening there. Refinea monitors your visibility across ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, and Google AI Overviews. AI Visibility Index, Share of Voice, citation position, sentiment - all measured on the prompts your real customers ask, not generic industry benchmarks. You see where you win, where a competitor takes your place, and how it shifts over time.

section3.title: Know exactly which sources AI trusts in your market.
section3.body: AI doesn't invent answers, it finds sources it considers authoritative and cites them. If you're not among those sources, you don't exist in that answer. Refinea shows you which domains get cited in your category, how citations split between your properties, industry publications, and competitors, and the fan-out queries that each model runs behind the scenes to build its response. You see where you need to be present and why.

section4.body: Seeing where you're invisible is useful but being able to fix it is what actually matters. Refinea closes the gap between diagnosis and action: you get the content, the audits, and the brand evidence layer to actually change how AI answers about you.

content.title: AI-Optimized Content
content.body: Create new content calibrated to your buyer personas and optimized for AI citation, or get specific fix-this-here recommendations for existing pages. Publish to WordPress in one click.

workflows.title: Agentic Workflows
workflows.body: Automated workflows that audit your site for AI visibility issues - from content quality to crawlability to structured data. Run the ones we've built, or create your own. Each workflow tells you what to fix, in priority order.

brandMemory.title: Brand Memory
brandMemory.body: AI cites what it can verify. Upload your proof points, expert quotes, awards, and statistics, Refinea injects them into every piece of content you create so AI has your evidence, not someone else's.

section5.title: Every day, Refinea tells you what to do next.
section5.body: AI visibility changes daily: new content, competitor moves, model updates. Refinea monitors continuously and generates prioritized insights: opportunities to capture, threats to address, content gaps to fill. Each insight has a confidence level, severity, and a clear recommended action.

banner.title: We use cookies to improve Refinea
banner.description: We measure how the site is used so we can make it better for you. All analytics data stays in the EU, IP addresses are not stored. You can accept, reject or choose what to enable. Your choice is saved for 6 months.

intro.title: Your privacy matters
intro.body: We use a minimal set of cookies to understand how visitors use Refinea so we can improve it. Below you can choose which categories to enable. You can change your choice anytime from the Footer.

necessary.title: Strictly necessary cookies
necessary.body: These cookies are required for the site to function: language selection, security, your consent choice itself. They never identify you and cannot be disabled.

analytics.title: Analytics cookies
analytics.body: Help us understand how visitors use Refinea so we can improve the product. We use Google Analytics 4 with IP anonymization and EU data hosting where available. Behavioral data is retained for 14 months.

more.title: More information
more.body: For details on what data we collect, how long we keep it, and how to exercise your GDPR rights, read our __PRIVACY_LINK__.

cookies.ga: Google Analytics — distinguishes unique visitors anonymously.
cookies.gaProperty: Google Analytics — stores session state for the Refinea property.
cookies.cc: Stores your cookie consent choice so we do not ask again.

hero.subtitle: We continuously measure how often AI models cite the vendors of each sector. An independent observatory, updated daily, on the new discovery channel reshaping how marketing reaches customers.

industry.subtitle: How AI models recommend TeamSystem, Zucchetti, Aruba and the other vendors in the category.

chart.title: AI Visibility Index
chart.subtitle: Mapping the {industry} market's influence on AI-Decision Makers

table.title: Full ranking

prompts.title: Example of prompt we analyze for {industry}

methodology.title: How we measure the AI Visibility Index
methodology.intro: A four-stage protocol applied identically to every industry we track.

step1.label: 01 — Prompt intelligence
step1.title: Grounded in what people actually search for
step1.body: We continuously aggregate real-world search demand from premium data providers — the queries users actually type when looking for products in a given industry. Machine learning, semantic embeddings, and clustering then refine this signal into a curated panel of high-intent prompts.

step2.label: 02 — Multi-run sampling
step2.title: Statistical robustness through repeated sampling
step2.body: Every prompt is submitted to the target AI model ten times per day, in independent runs. The result: thousands of responses weekly, with a precision level publishable in peer-reviewed research.

step3.label: 03 — Brand extraction
step3.title: Canonicalized entity recognition
step3.body: A two-stage system combining deterministic matching and machine learning. Alias graphs collapse sub-brands into single canonical entities, while a curated blocklist eliminates false positives at the source.

step4.label: 04 — Aggregation
step4.title: AVI as a binomial estimator
step4.body: A brand's AVI is the share of AI responses in which it is cited. A standard statistical estimator — comparable across time, independent of panel composition.

whatIs.a: Refinea Analysis is the first European AI ranking — an independent, daily-updated observatory that measures how often AI models cite the vendors of each industry we track. For every industry, we build a curated panel of high-intent prompts from real search demand, run them ten times a day against the target AI models, extract brand citations from each response, and aggregate the results into the AI Visibility Index (AVI). Built by Refinea, it gives marketers and brand teams a public benchmark for visibility on the new discovery channel reshaping modern marketing.

updateFrequency.q: How often is the data updated?
updateFrequency.a: Every 24 hours. A nightly job runs the full prompt panel against the target AI models at 03:00 UTC; the leaderboard you see is always the most recent run. The "Last run" date next to each chart tells you exactly when the snapshot was generated.

missingBrand.q: Why is my brand missing from the leaderboard — or showing a lower AVI than expected?
missingBrand.a: Two possible reasons. First, brands surface organically: if the AI doesn't cite you for any of the prompts in the panel, you simply don't appear. Second, we use a curated blocklist to filter out non-brand entities (institutions, common nouns, infrastructure) which can also cap certain matches. If you believe your brand should be tracked, contact us at hello@refinea.io — we add new vendors to the reference panel on request.

newIndustry.q: Can my industry be added to Refinea Analysis?
newIndustry.a: Yes. We add new industries based on demand and feasibility (sufficient query volume + a viable prompt panel). The "Coming soon" pills in the toggle are placeholders for industries already in our roadmap; reach out at hello@refinea.io to propose yours.

freeAccess.q: Is Refinea Analysis free? Do I need an account?
freeAccess.a: Yes, it's completely free and public — no signup, no paywall. The methodology, prompt panels, and extraction pipelines that power it are proprietary, but the leaderboards themselves are open data. If you want to track your own brand in real time across all major AI engines (not just the public industries we publish), that's what the Refinea platform is for.

hero.title: Everything you can do in Refinea
hero.subtitle: Read your numbers, understand the workflows, train Refinea on your brand, and connect the public API. Built for marketers — no pipeline tech inside.

getStarted.title: From URL to your first results in ten minutes
getStarted.body: Onboarding walks you through five short steps. Refinea handles the rest in the background — your first analysis lands within 30 minutes, then Refinea re-runs every prompt against every model every 48 hours.

s1.title: Add your URL
s1.body: Paste your website. Refinea reads it and pulls out what your business does, who you sell to, and where.

s2.title: Review your business profile
s2.body: Confirm the products, industries, and geographies Refinea detected. Edit anything that's off.

s3.title: Review buyer personas
s3.body: Refinea drafts three to five personas. Keep, edit, or replace them — they drive the questions we ask the AI.

s4.title: Review your prompts
s4.body: The questions Refinea will run against ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude and Perplexity. Rewrite or remove any of them.

s5.title: Watch the first run
s5.body: Refinea queries every model with every prompt. Your first full analysis lands within 30 minutes — the Overview page populates live as results come in. From then on, every prompt is re-run every 48 hours.

metrics.title: The four numbers on your Overview
metrics.body: These are the headline metrics. Each one tells you something different — and together they answer: am I visible, am I leading, and is the tone working for me?

avi.body: Share of AI answers that mention your brand. The headline number. Tells you whether you appear in the conversation at all.

sov.body: Your share of all brand mentions across competitors. Tells you whether you're leading the conversation when AI is talking about your market.

rank.body: Your position in the leaderboard of the most-mentioned brands in your market. Updates after every analysis run.

sentiment.body: How AI describes you when it mentions you, on a scale from −1 (always negative) to +1 (always positive). Zero is neutral.

sov.title: How to read SOV against AVI
sov.body: AVI tells you how often you appear. Share of Voice tells you how much of the conversation is about you. Reading them together is where the diagnosis happens.

up.body: You're getting mentioned more, and so are competitors. The whole market is growing.

flat.body: Competitors are losing ground. Press the advantage.

down.body: A competitor is gaining. Open Citations and check which one.

citations.title: Every URL the AI quotes
citations.body: Every time an AI cites a URL while talking about your market, Refinea logs it. Domains are auto-tagged with one of eight categories so you can read the source mix at a glance.

owner.body: Domains you control. You set these from the Sources page.

magazine.body: News and trade publications. The strongest earned signal.

reference.body: Wikipedia, Britannica, Statista. The most trusted foundational citations.

forum.body: Reddit, Quora, Stack Overflow. User-generated discussion.

government.body: .gov portals and official statistics. High-trust regulatory references.

other.body: Anything that doesn't fit, or that we couldn't classify with confidence.

personas.title: Who Refinea asks the AI on your behalf
personas.body: A persona is a profile Refinea uses when asking the AI a question. Each one has a role, an industry, a location, and the jobs they're trying to get done. Different personas trigger different answers — the mix matters.

ai.body: Refinea drafts personas from your products, industries, and geographies.

data.body: If Google Search Console is connected, Refinea clusters real search queries into persona archetypes.

you.body: Write the persona yourself. Refinea structures it.

insights.title: Up to six things worth doing this week
insights.body: Refinea reads your latest run and surfaces up to six insights — each one a concrete change in your data with a recommended action. You can acknowledge, work on, or dismiss any of them.

progress.body: You've acknowledged it and are working on it.

resolved.body: The metric improved, or you dismissed it. Resolved insights have a 30-day cooldown before they can come back.

workflows.title: Three audits, one URL at a time
workflows.body: Workflows grade any page the way an AI assistant reads it. You paste the URL, the workflow runs, you get a score and a fix list. Workflows never change your site — they tell you what to change.

crawl.title: Crawlability
crawl.body: Can AI crawlers actually read your pages? The audit checks the technical layer between you and the bots that power AI search.

schema.title: Structured Data
schema.body: Does your schema tell AI who you are? The audit reads your JSON-LD and tells you what's missing — and generates a fix you can paste into your head.

quality.title: Content Quality
quality.body: Is your writing easy for AI to quote? The audit grades how citable each section of your page is — and where it falls short.
quality.c1: BLUF — direct answer in first 40 words

brandMemory.title: Train Refinea on your brand
brandMemory.body: Brand Memory is the part of Refinea that knows you. A library of verified facts about your brand — proof points, expert voices, statistics, your editorial voice — that Refinea uses every time it writes content on your behalf.
brandMemory.assetsBody: Three types of evidence the AI can use when writing about you. Refinea finds them, you approve or reject.

proof.body: Specific, verifiable claims about customer outcomes, certifications, partnerships, or milestones.

expert.body: Quotable people — founders, CEOs, domain experts — with statements they've actually made.

facts.body: Standalone data: your own numbers or referenced research.

brandMemory.kitBody: Your editorial voice in one place. Tells Refinea how you sound when it writes for you.

kit.k1: Brand overview — who you are in two paragraphs
kit.k2: Competitor landscape — how you frame the comparison
kit.k3: Editorial stance — the opinions you'll take
kit.k5: Voice signature — words you love, words you avoid

brandMemory.autopilotBody: You don't have to fill Brand Memory by hand. Autopilot reads your website, blog, press coverage, and analytics, and drafts your kit and assets for you. Run it once to get started, then refine.

api.title: Pull your data out
api.body: Use the public API to stream Refinea data into your own dashboards, your data warehouse, or a Slack bot. Eight read endpoints — domains, mentions, sentiment, sources, search queries, prompts metrics, and an overview rollup.
api.authBody: Every request needs an X-API-Key header. To get a key, ask your account admin — keys are issued from the admin panel and tied to your user.
api.note: Keys are shown once at creation. Store them somewhere safe — if you lose one, revoke it and create a new one.

cta.title: Ready to see how AI sees your brand?
cta.body: Start a free trial or book a 30-minute walkthrough. Your first AI visibility analysis lands within 30 minutes, then refreshes every 48 hours.
